items.title: SpaceX just won a second Golden Dome contract. This one is $4.16 billion.
items.summary: The US Space Force awarded SpaceX a $4.16 billion contract on Friday to build satellites that track foreign aircraft and missiles. items.title: Ferrari’s CEO says the Luce deserves “respect.” Its former chairman says it deserves a different logo.

items.title: AI is killing the summer internship. The entry-level pipeline that built careers is breaking.
items.summary: Katelyn Watterson owes her career to a summer internship. As a student at American University, she spent a summer working for a high-end beauty brand in New York.
